detection_notes: H2 fingerprint matches Chrome 131 SETTINGS values. Detection relies on combination of: (1) missing sec-ch-ua-form-factor header present in real Chrome; (2) absence of cookie jar consistency across redirects; (3) behavioral signals. SETTINGS-level impersonation is good. Real binary capture needed to verify PRIORITY frame presence/absence.
notes: curl_cffi impersonate=chrome131 H2 SETTINGS. Akamai fingerprint value is documented as matching Chrome 131 when impersonation is working correctly. The real differentiator between curl_cffi and Chrome at H2 level requires byte-level analysis of PRIORITY frames and HEADERS pseudo-header ordering.
